basic.question_text: 删除 2005 年之前发行的所有电影（注意这将级联影响 boxoffice 表吗？——SQLite 默认不开启外键级联删除）。
basic.verification_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movies WHERE year < 2005;

basic.question_text: 删除 Andrew Stanton 导演的所有电影。
basic.question_context: DELETE FROM movies WHERE director = 'Andrew Stanton';
basic.reference_sql: DELETE FROM movies WHERE director = 'Andrew Stanton';
hints: DELETE FROM movies WHERE director = 'Andrew Stanton';
DELETE FROM movies WHERE director = 'Andrew Stanton';
DELETE FROM movies WHERE director = 'Andrew Stanton';
basic.verification_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movies WHERE director = 'Andrew Stanton';

basic.question_text: 删除工作年限为 0 的员工。
basic.verification_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE years_employed = 0;

intermediate.question_text: 删除评分低于 7.0 的电影的票房记录（仅从 boxoffice 表删除）。
intermediate.verification_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM boxoffice WHERE rating < 7.0;

intermediate.question_text: 使用子查询：删除票房低于平均票房的 boxoffice 记录。
intermediate.question_context: DELETE FROM boxoffice WHERE domestic_sales + international_sales < (SELECT AVG(domestic_sales + international_sales) FROM boxoffice);
intermediate.reference_sql: DELETE FROM boxoffice WHERE domestic_sales + international_sales < (SELECT AVG(domestic_sales + international_sales) FROM boxoffice);
hints: DELETE FROM boxoffice WHERE domestic_sales+international_sales < (SELECT AVG(domestic_sales+international_sales) FROM boxoffice);
DELETE FROM boxoffice WHERE domestic_sales+international_sales < (SELECT AVG(domestic_sales+international_sales) FROM boxoffice);
intermediate.verification_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM boxoffice WHERE domestic_sales + international_sales < (SELECT AVG(domestic_sales + international_sales) FROM boxoffice);

challenge.question_text: 如果要删除一个导演及其所有电影，但 boxoffice 表中有外键引用，应该先删哪个表？写正确的删除顺序（先删 boxoffice 中该导演电影的记录，再删 movies 中的记录）。实践：删除 Brad Bird 导演的电影（先删 boxoffice，再删 movies）。
challenge.question_context: 需要两条 DELETE 语句。
challenge.reference_sql: DELETE FROM boxoffice WHERE movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies WHERE director = 'Brad Bird'); DELETE FROM movies WHERE director = 'Brad Bird';
hints: 先删子表 boxoffice，再删主表 movies
DELETE FROM boxoffice WHERE movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies WHERE director='Brad Bird'); DELETE FROM movies WHERE director='Brad Bird';
注意外键约束：先删引用表再删被引用表
challenge.verification_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM boxoffice WHERE movie_id IN (SELECT id FROM movies WHERE director = 'Brad Bird'); DELETE FROM movies WHERE director = 'Brad Bird';
